name: Netscape Communications Corporation
description: Netscape Communications Corporation was an American computer services company founded in 1994 by Marc Andreessen and Jim Clark. Originally known as Mosaic Communications Corporation, it became famous for developing the Netscape Navigator web browser, which played a pivotal role in the early growth of the World Wide Web. The company was a pioneer in internet technology, introducing innovations such as HTTP cookies and the JavaScript programming language. Although it was eventually acquired by AOL in 1999, Netscape remains a landmark entity in the history of the internet and the development of modern web browsing software.
